dad: A friendly clay figurine dad character, half-body facing forward, short hair, slight stubble, warm smile, wearing a casual collared shirt
brother: A clay figurine boy character standing next to a slightly smaller clay boy, big brother with arm around little brother, both smiling
sister: A clay figurine girl character standing next to a slightly smaller clay girl, big sister with arm around little sister, both smiling with rosy cheeks
grandma: A warm clay figurine grandmother character, half-body, white curly hair, reading glasses on nose, gentle smile, rosy cheeks, wearing a cozy cardigan
grandpa: A warm clay figurine grandfather character, half-body, white hair, friendly mustache, gentle smile, rosy cheeks, wearing a sweater vest
girl: A cute clay figurine girl character, full body, pigtails with bows, rosy cheeks, big smile, wearing a simple dress
boy: A cute clay figurine boy character, half-body facing forward, short messy hair, rosy cheeks, big friendly smile, wearing a t-shirt
teacher: A friendly clay figurine teacher character, half-body facing forward, holding an open book, wearing glasses, warm smile, standing near a small chalkboard
student: A cute clay figurine child sitting at a small desk, holding a pencil, looking up with a curious smile, wearing a backpack
family: A group of clay figurine characters standing together - two adult figures and two child figures, all smiling, in a close group hug, visible clay texture
people: Three or four clay figurine characters of different heights standing in a friendly group, all with simple happy faces, diverse appearances
they: Three clay figurine children standing together in a small group, one pointing at the other two, simple happy faces
mine: A clay figurine child hugging a teddy bear tightly to their chest with a determined expression, clearly possessive body language
she: A clay figurine girl character, half-body, one hand gesturing outward as if presenting someone, friendly face with a smile
we: Two or three clay figurine children with arms around each others shoulders, all smiling, looking at viewer, sense of togetherness
school_people: A group of clay figurine characters in a classroom setting - a teacher figure with two or three child figures, all smiling, with a small chalkboard behind them
tired: A clay figurine child yawning with eyes closed, hand covering mouth, droopy posture, maybe leaning on a pillow, absolutely no text or letters
yes: A clay figurine child nodding head enthusiastically with a big smile, giving a thumbs up, happy expression
no: A clay figurine child shaking head side to side, hands up in a stop gesture, slightly frowning but not upset
bathroom: A clay figurine child doing a potty dance with legs crossed, slightly urgent expression, standing near a small clay toilet
excuse_me: A clay figurine child politely raising one hand to get attention, slight smile, other hand near mouth, gentle expression
problem: A clay figurine child scratching their head with a confused worried expression, furrowed brow, maybe looking at a broken toy on the ground
i_dont_know: A clay figurine child with palms up in a shrugging gesture, raised eyebrows, mouth in an uncertain line, shoulders raised, clearly confused expression
maybe: A clay figurine child with head tilted to one side, one finger on chin in a thinking pose, slightly squinting eyes, uncertain half-smile
hello: A clay figurine child waving one hand enthusiastically with a big welcoming smile, absolutely no text or symbols
whats_up: A clay figurine child with a casual relaxed pose, one hand raised in a chin-up greeting gesture, friendly curious expression
goodbye: A clay figurine child waving goodbye with a slightly sad but friendly smile, one arm raised waving
nice_to_meet: Two clay figurine children shaking hands and smiling at each other, simple clean composition
please: A clay figurine child with hands pressed together in a pleading prayer gesture, sweet hopeful expression with big eyes
thank_you: A clay figurine child with hands pressed together near chest, slight bow of head, warm grateful smile visible
youre_welcome: A clay figurine child with one hand on chest and other hand gesturing outward warmly, kind smile, gentle welcoming expression
okay: A clay figurine child giving a thumbs up with a calm content smile, relaxed body language
be_quiet: A clay figurine child with finger pressed to lips in a shh gesture, wide eyes, slightly mischievous or serious expression
cool: A clay figurine child wearing small sunglasses, leaning back casually with a confident smirk, arms crossed
great: A clay figurine child with both arms raised in celebration, big excited smile, maybe jumping slightly
uh_oh: A clay figurine child with hands on cheeks, wide surprised eyes, open mouth in an oops expression, slight lean back, full half-body visible
no_way: A clay figurine child with both hands pushing forward in a stop refusal gesture, shocked wide eyes, mouth open in disbelief, leaning back
i_love_you: A clay figurine child hugging themselves or making a heart shape with hands over chest, big warm smile, rosy cheeks, small hearts floating nearby
oh_my: A clay figurine child with both hands on cheeks, wide surprised eyes, open mouth, eyebrows raised high, astonished expression
social: Two or three clay figurine children talking and gesturing to each other in a friendly group, expressive faces with smiles, speech bubble shapes nearby
food: A single clay plate with a fork and knife, viewed from above, on a clean pastel background
snack: A small clay bowl filled with colorful snack mix pieces (pretzels, crackers, cheese puffs) on a clean pastel background
graham_cracker: A single rectangular golden-brown clay graham cracker with a scored line down the middle and small dotted texture
snack_bar: A single unwrapped clay granola bar showing oats and nuts texture, with a torn foil wrapper partially peeled back
drinks: A colorful clay juice box next to a small clay glass with a straw
milk: A white clay milk carton with a simple red stripe, next to a small clay glass of white milk, no text or letters
chocolate_milk: A clear clay glass filled with brown chocolate milk, with a straw
water: A clay glass of clear blue-tinted water with small clay water droplets on the side
soda: A single clay soda can with a pop-top tab, in bright red, no text or letters
ice_cubes: Three or four translucent blue-white clay ice cubes stacked loosely with small water droplets around them
snacks: A clay plate with a few different recognizable snack items (a cookie, some crackers, a pretzel) arranged neatly
crackers: A small stack of square clay saltine crackers with tiny dot holes on top
cookie: A single round clay chocolate chip cookie with visible chocolate chip dots
fruit_snack: A few colorful clay gummy fruit snack shapes (bear, star, ring) spilling out of a small pouch, no text
pudding: A single clay pudding cup with chocolate swirl on top and a small spoon, no icons or symbols

pretzels: Three or four small clay pretzel twists scattered on a clean pastel background
chips: A clay bowl overflowing with golden wavy potato chips, no face or character features

hamburger: A puffy round clay hamburger with visible bun, patty, lettuce, tomato, and cheese layers, viewed at a slight angle
hot_dog: A clay hot dog in a bun with a squiggle of yellow mustard on top, no symbols or icons

salad: A clay bowl filled with green lettuce leaves, cherry tomatoes, and carrot slices, no text or symbols

pancakes: A stack of three round clay pancakes with a pat of butter on top and maple syrup dripping down the sides, no text
syrup: A clay maple syrup bottle with an amber-colored body and a small cap, with a drip of syrup coming from the spout, no text or letters
peanut_butter: An open clay peanut butter jar with creamy tan peanut butter visible inside and a butter knife resting on top
jelly: A clay jar of red purple jelly or jam with the lid slightly open, a small butter knife with jelly on it beside the jar, no text or numbers
banana: A single curved yellow clay banana, nothing else in the frame
orange: A single round clay orange fruit with a small green leaf on top and a subtle dimpled texture
grapes: A clay bunch of purple grapes with a green leaf and curling vine tendril on top, no extra symbols
lemon: A single bright yellow clay lemon with a small green leaf, nothing else in the frame

green_beans: Several long green clay green beans lying in a small pile, no icons or symbols
pepper: A single red clay bell pepper, viewed at a slight angle showing its rounded shape and small stem, no symbols
potato: A single brown clay potato with small eye indentations and a slightly rough surface
tomato: A single round red clay tomato with a small green star-shaped stem on top, no symbols or decorations
ball: A colorful striped clay rubber ball (red, blue, yellow stripes), no text or letters
blocks: A small stack of colorful clay building blocks (cube shapes in red, blue, yellow, green), no symbols
bubbles: A clay bubble wand with several translucent iridescent clay soap bubbles floating around it
playdoh: An open clay Play-Doh container with a colorful swirl of clay dough coming out the top
basketball: A single orange clay basketball with black seam lines, no extra symbols
games: A clay board game with a few colorful game pieces and a single die
bingo: A clay bingo card with colorful circles in a grid pattern (no numbers) and a few clay bingo chips beside it, no text
pencil: A single yellow clay pencil with a pink eraser tip, sharpened point, and silver ferrule band
paint: A clay paint palette with colorful paint dollops and a paintbrush resting across it, no text or hands
scissors: A pair of clay safety scissors with colorful handles (one blue, one green), slightly open
glue: A white clay glue bottle with an orange cap and a small drip of glue from the tip, no text or letters
paper: A few sheets of white clay paper, slightly fanned out with one sheet curling at the corner
school: A colorful clay diorama of a small school building with a red brick facade, bright blue door, green bushes, and a yellow flag on the bell tower
places: A simple clay map pin marker standing on a small clay globe or map, bright red pin
dining_room: A clay diorama of a dining table with four chairs, plates and cups on the table, and a hanging light above, warm pastel colors
airport: A clay diorama of a small airport terminal with a control tower and a clay airplane on a runway, no text or letters
bowling_alley: A clay diorama of a bowling lane with white pins at the end and a colorful bowling ball rolling down the lane, simple and clean
grocery_store: A clay diorama of a small grocery store with an awning, shelves of colorful clay fruits and vegetables visible through the window, and a shopping cart outside, no text or signs
mall: A clay diorama of a two-story shopping mall building with multiple colorful storefronts, an escalator visible inside, and small clay shopping bags
movie: A clay movie theater scene with a big screen, red curtains, and a bucket of popcorn in the foreground, colorful and clear
restaurant: A clay diorama of a small restaurant building with a striped awning, a little table with chairs outside, and a plate of food visible, warm colors
store: A clay diorama of a small shop with a striped awning, an open door, and colorful items displayed in the window, no text or letters
playground: A clay diorama of a playground with a recognizable slide, a swing set, and bright green ground, simple and colorful
zoo: A clay diorama of a zoo entrance gate with a giraffe and elephant peeking over the fence, colorful and charming, no text or letters
class: A clay diorama of a simple classroom with a chalkboard, one desk, a chair, and an apple, clean and recognizable
bus: A clay school bus, yellow with black wheels, simple and chunky with no text, letters, or signs anywhere on it
library: A clay diorama of library bookshelves filled with colorful books, a small reading table and chair in front, warm and inviting
speech: A clay speech bubble coming from a simple clay mouth or face, with small sound waves, on a clean background
weather: A clay sun peeking out from behind a clay rain cloud, with a few raindrops, simple and clear composition
sun: A bright yellow clay sun with short clay rays radiating outward, on a light blue background, no text or letters
snow: A clay cloud with white clay snowflakes falling gently below it, on a light blue background, simple and clean
wind: Clay swirling wind lines blowing a small clay leaf and bending a clay tree
hot_: A bright clay sun with red and orange heat waves radiating downward, a small clay thermometer showing high temperature
cold_: A clay snowflake with a shivering clay figure or icicles, blue-toned, simple and recognizable, no text
fog: Layers of soft gray and white clay wisps creating a foggy scene, with a barely visible clay tree or house emerging from the fog
body: A simple clay figure of a childs body, standing front-facing with arms slightly out, neutral pose, clean background
head: A clay childs head in profile or front view, showing hair, eyes, nose, and mouth clearly
arm: A simple clay arm from shoulder to hand, bent slightly at the elbow, skin-toned clay
leg: A simple clay leg from thigh to foot, slightly bent at the knee, skin-toned clay
eye: A clay human eye with a white sclera, colored iris, black pupil, and eyelids, front-facing
nose: A single clay human nose seen from the front, simple and clear, skin-toned
mouth: A simple clay mouth with lips, slightly open showing teeth, no extra elements
colors: An array of colorful clay balls or swatches in rainbow order (red, orange, yellow, green, blue, purple), arranged in a row or circle, no text
red: A bold, bright red clay ball on a white neutral background, unmistakably red
orange_: A bold, bright orange clay ball on a white neutral background, unmistakably orange
yellow: A bold, bright yellow clay ball on a white neutral background, unmistakably yellow
green: A bold, bright green clay ball on a white neutral background, unmistakably green
blue: A bold, bright blue clay ball on a white neutral background, unmistakably blue
purple: A bold, bright purple clay ball on a white neutral background, unmistakably purple
pink: A bold, bright pink clay ball on a white neutral background, unmistakably pink
black: A bold, solid black clay ball on a white neutral background, unmistakably black
brown: A bold, brown clay ball on a white neutral background, unmistakably brown
white: A bright white clay ball on a soft gray or light blue background, so the white stands out clearly
grey: A bold grey clay ball on a white neutral background, unmistakably grey
gold: A shiny gold clay ball or coin shape on a white neutral background, unmistakably gold
silver: A shiny silver clay ball or coin shape on a white neutral background, unmistakably silver
tan: A bold tan beige clay ball on a white neutral background, unmistakably tan
shape: Three or four basic clay shapes (circle, square, triangle) arranged neatly together in different colors
circle: A single clean clay circle shape in a bright color on a neutral background
square: A single clean clay square shape in a bright color on a neutral background
triangle: A single clean clay triangle shape in a bright color (blue or green) on a neutral background, no extra decorations
rectangle: A single clean clay rectangle shape in a bright color on a neutral background, clearly elongated to distinguish from square
diamond: A single clean clay diamond (rhombus) shape in a bright color on a neutral background
oval: A single clean clay oval ellipse shape in a bright color on a neutral background
octagon: A single clean clay octagon shape in red (like a stop sign shape) on a neutral background
previous_page: A simple clay left-pointing arrow on a rounded square base
cloud: A fluffy white clay cloud with visible clay texture and fingerprint-like marks, soft blue-grey shadows, on a light blue background
bad: A simple clay thumbs-down hand gesture on a clean background
sad: Close-up of a clay child character with tears rolling down cheeks, droopy eyes and a frown
angry: Close-up of a clay child character with furrowed brows, red cheeks, gritted teeth, showing anger
new: A shiny unwrapped clay gift box with a sparkle effect, bright and fresh looking
old: A worn, faded clay teddy bear with patches and stitches next to a bright new one
hard: A clay character straining to push a large heavy clay boulder, showing effort and difficulty
quiet: A clay child character with finger pressed to lips in a shh gesture, with small soundwave lines crossed out
clean_: A sparkling clean clay plate or a tidy clay child with neat clothes, gleaming sparkle effects
broken: A clay toy or cup cracked in half with pieces scattered, clearly showing something broken
empty: A completely empty clay bowl or jar, tipped slightly to show nothing inside
ugly: A clay child looking at a messy lumpy clay sculpture and making a disgusted scrunched-up face
mean: Close-up of a clay child character with narrowed eyes and a sneering expression, arms crossed
easy: A clay child character effortlessly stacking simple blocks with a relaxed happy expression
fun: A clay child character jumping with arms raised, surrounded by confetti and balloons, big smile
boring: A clay child character resting chin on hands at a desk, eyes half-closed with droopy expression, looking extremely uninterested
terrible: A clay child character with a deeply unhappy grimace, arms drooping at sides, storm cloud above head
worst: A clay trophy or medal that is broken and tarnished, or a clay child on a last-place podium looking dejected
better: Two clay items side by side - a small okay thing and a noticeably improved bigger shinier version with an upward arrow between them
dumb: A clay child character with a blank confused expression, scratching head, with a tangled scribble thought bubble above
cute: A clay child character hugging a small adorable clay kitten or bunny, both with big sparkly eyes and rosy cheeks
cool_: A clay child character wearing sunglasses, striking a casual pose with a slight confident smirk
uncomfortable: A clay child character squirming on a hard chair, fidgeting with an uneasy expression
warm: A clay child character wrapped in a cozy blanket next to a gentle fireplace glow, rosy warm cheeks
light_: A clay child character easily holding up a large feather in one hand, floating upward, showing lightness of weight
few: Just two or three small clay balls sitting alone on a large empty surface, emphasizing scarcity
more: A small pile of clay balls with an arrow and additional balls being added, showing the concept of increasing
away: A clay character walking away from the viewer toward a distant horizon, getting smaller
near: Two clay characters standing very close together, almost touching, with a short line between them
there: A clay character pointing forward into the distance at a specific spot marked with a bright circle
back_: A clay arrow pointing backward or left with a clay character walking backward or turning around
top: A clay character standing on top of a tall clay block or mountain, arms raised in triumph
bottom: A clay character sitting at the very bottom of a tall clay structure, looking up
left: A large clay arrow pointing to the left
right_: A large clay arrow pointing to the right, clearly showing direction
cheap: A small simple clay coin or price tag with a tiny amount, next to a happy clay character
expensive: A large sparkling clay diamond or gold bar on a pedestal, with a clay character looking up at it in awe
long: A very long clay snake or rope stretched across the full width, clearly showing extended length
short: A very short small clay character standing next to a tall ruler or measuring stick, barely reaching the bottom markings
low: A clay character crouching or ducking very low to the ground, under a low bar or ceiling
quick: A clay rabbit or cheetah running with speed lines behind it, showing quickness
surprised: Close-up of a clay child character with wide open eyes, raised eyebrows, and an open mouth showing genuine surprise
again: A clay character doing the same action twice side by side (like jumping), with a circular arrow connecting them
between: A small clay ball positioned between two larger clay blocks, clearly sandwiched in the middle
middle: Three clay objects in a row with the center one highlighted or glowing, clearly showing the middle position
front: A line of clay characters with the front one stepping forward, clearly in front of the others and facing the viewer
